description: DEPTH=12 ASPECT_RATIO=40 same width deeper no gain

DEPTH=7 ASPECT_RATIO=73 (fewer layers, more steps expected but got fewer)

M=//2 (512 tokens too close to L=1024 too costly)
SSSM with S=//32 (32 tokens too narrow even with M=256)
